info.title: PolyNode API
info.description: Real-time Polymarket data API with decoded mempool settlements, OHLCV candles, and full Polygon JSON-RPC proxy.

get.description: Liveness probe. Returns 200 OK if the server is running.
Returns 200 if node is connected and Redis is reachable, 503 otherwise.

post.description: JSON-RPC 2.0 proxy supporting standard eth_*/net_* methods (forwarded to full Polygon node with caching) and custom pn_* methods (served from in-memory state). Supports single and batch requests (max 100 per batch).

requestBody.description: JSON-RPC 2.0 request (single object or array for batch)

get.description: Returns OHLCV price candles for a token at the specified resolution.

post.description: Generates a new API key. Rate limited to 1 per IP per day. The key is returned only once and cannot be retrieved again.

get.description: Returns top markets sorted by 24-hour volume. Includes metadata enrichment when available.
Looks up a market by its Polymarket condition ID. Returns full metadata, all token IDs with prices, and outcome prices.
Returns a filtered, paginated list of markets. Supports sorting, category filtering, and volume thresholds.

parameters.name: active_only
parameters.description: Only markets with trades in the last hour

get.description: Looks up a market by its URL slug. Returns full metadata, all token IDs with prices, and outcome prices.
Returns detailed market data for a specific token ID, including metadata, liquidity, and description.
Full-text search across all market questions. Results ranked by volume and liquidity. Closed markets are excluded by default.

parameters.name: include_inactive
parameters.description: Include closed/inactive markets in results (defaults to false)

get.description: Search the public web and return normalized organic results. Intended for low-volume agent context, research, and enrichment workflows.

parameters.name: max_results
parameters.description: Number of normalized organic results. Defaults to 10, capped at 20.

parameters.name: engines
parameters.description: Comma-separated engine adapters. Defaults to bing,duckduckgo. brave is available as an opt-in adapter.

parameters.name: cache_ttl_seconds
parameters.description: Cache TTL for the query. Defaults to 600, capped at 3600.

get.description: Returns market statistics including last price, 24h volume, and 24-hour OHLCV derived from hourly candles.
Returns system status including node connectivity, uptime, stream lengths, and state engine summary.

Returns the full order book for a token, including all bid and ask price levels, market properties, and PolyNode metadata enrichment.

The response format is compatible with Polymarket's CLOB API. Data is served from PolyNode's live orderbook engine, which maintains real-time state via WebSocket deltas from Polymarket.

parameters.name: token_id
parameters.description: Token ID (all digits), condition ID (starts with 0x), or event slug. Token ID returns a single book; condition ID and slug return all outcomes.

example.error: No orderbook exists for the requested token id

get.description:
Returns the midpoint price for a token, calculated as the average of the best bid and best ask.

If the book is one-sided (only bids or only asks), the missing side is treated as 0. Response is enriched with PolyNode market metadata.

parameters.name: token_id
parameters.description: Token ID (all digits), condition ID (starts with 0x), or event slug. Token ID returns a single book; condition ID and slug return all outcomes.

example.error: No orderbook exists for the requested token id

get.description:
Returns the bid-ask spread for a token, calculated as the difference between the best ask and best bid price.

For one-sided books, the spread equals the best price on the existing side. Response is enriched with PolyNode market metadata.

parameters.name: token_id
parameters.description: Token ID (all digits), condition ID (starts with 0x), or event slug. Token ID returns a single book; condition ID and slug return all outcomes.

example.error: No orderbook exists for the requested token id

get.description:
Returns all current positions for a wallet with full P&L breakdown. Each position includes unrealized cash P&L, realized P&L, percent P&L, average entry price, current value, and initial value.

Data is sourced from Polymarket and enriched with PolyNode market metadata (title, slug, image, outcome names).

Use `sortBy` to rank positions by P&L. Supports pagination with `limit` and `offset`.

parameters.name: sizeThreshold
parameters.description: Minimum position size to include (default 0 = all positions)

positions.title: Will Donald Trump win the 2028 Republican presidential nomination?

get.description:
Returns positions with P&L for multiple wallets in a single request. Up to 20 wallets per request. All lookups run in parallel.

Subject to your plan's standard rate limit. Each wallet counts as one request toward the limit.

400.description: Missing wallets parameter or exceeds 20 wallet limit

get.description:
Returns recent trades for a wallet, enriched with PolyNode market metadata. Each trade includes side (BUY/SELL), price, size, outcome, and transaction hash.

Supports pagination with `limit` and `offset`.

Returns all holder positions for a market with per-holder P&L breakdown. Results are grouped by outcome token, with each holder's cash P&L, realized P&L, total P&L, average entry price, and current value.

Accepts a condition ID (0x-prefixed) or market slug. Supports sorting by P&L and filtering by position status (open/closed/all).

When `includeTrades=true`, this endpoint is rate limited to **60 requests per minute** per key (separate from your standard rate limit).

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum holders per outcome token (default 50, max 500)

parameters.name: includeTrades
parameters.description: Enrich each position with `firstTradeAt` and `lastTradeAt` timestamps. Responses will be slower. Default false. **Rate limited to 60 requests per minute per key** (separate from your standard rate limit).

parameters.name: user
parameters.description: Filter to specific wallet address(es). Accepts a single address or multiple comma-separated addresses (max 20). Returns only those wallets' positions in this market.

200.description: Market positions grouped by outcome token

example.market_title: Will Donald Trump win the 2028 Republican presidential nomination?

404.description: Market not found for the given slug

get.description:
Returns trade history for a market, optionally filtered by trader wallet(s) and/or side (BUY/SELL). Enriched with PolyNode market metadata.

Accepts a condition ID (0x-prefixed) or market slug. The `user` parameter accepts comma-separated wallet addresses (max 20) to fetch trades for multiple traders in one request.

parameters.name: user
parameters.description: Filter by wallet address(es). Comma-separated for multiple (max 20).

404.description: Market not found for the given slug

get.description: Instantly resolve any Polymarket wallet address, EOA, or username. Returns the preferred Polymarket trading wallet in the legacy safe field, plus EOA, username, and wallet type. If the resolved EOA has a deployed deposit wallet, safe returns the deposit wallet.

parameters.name: query
parameters.description: Wallet address, EOA address, or Polymarket username (case-insensitive)

safe.description: Preferred Polymarket trading wallet. Field name is kept for backward compatibility; deposit wallet is returned when deployed, otherwise Safe/proxy.

type.description: Wallet type for the address returned in safe

get.description: Top 20 Polymarket traders ranked by profit or volume for a given time period.
Full profile for any Polymarket trader: PnL, volume, trade count, largest win, portfolio value, and account metadata.
Cumulative PnL time series for a trader at multiple resolutions.
Curated snapshot of what's trending on Polymarket: carousel highlights, breaking news, hot topics, featured events, and biggest movers.
50 most recent trades across all Polymarket markets with full trade metadata, wallet addresses, and transaction hashes.
Full event data with all sub-markets, current prices, volumes, liquidity, and token IDs.

parameters.name: slug
parameters.description: Event slug from Polymarket URL (e.g. how-many-fed-rate-cuts-in-2026)

example.title: How many Fed rate cuts in 2026?

markets.question: Will no Fed rate cuts happen in 2026?

get.description: Search Polymarket events by text query. Returns events with all sub-markets, token IDs, and current prices.

parameters.name: q
parameters.description: Search query (e.g. recession, Fed rate, Trump tariff)

events.title: How many Fed rate cuts in 2026?

markets.question: Will no Fed rate cuts happen in 2026?

get.description: Markets with the largest 24-hour price changes.

markets.question: Will Elon Musk's net worth be between $660b and $670b on March 31?

get.description: Browse markets by category with event counts and category-specific metadata.

parameters.name: category
parameters.description: Category slug: crypto, politics, sports, finance, economy, tech, pop-culture, geopolitics, weather, iran, elections, mentions

get.description: All crypto prediction markets with liquidity, volume, and open interest.
5-minute OHLC candles from PolyNode's live Chainlink tick archive. Returns ~2.5 hours of history. Accepts bare asset symbols like BTC and feed names like BTC/USD.
Historical 1-second crypto price ticks for the same feeds available on the price_feed WebSocket stream.

parameters.name: from
parameters.description: Start of the range as a Unix timestamp in milliseconds

parameters.name: to
parameters.description: End of the range as a Unix timestamp in milliseconds

400.description: Invalid symbol, time range, limit, or source

get.description: Open and close price for a specific crypto market window. The open price is the oracle price at market open; the close price updates in real time until the window completes.

parameters.name: window
parameters.description: Unix epoch timestamp of the market window start

200.description: Price data for the market window

get.description: Currently active 5-minute up-or-down markets for all 7 supported coins. Returns live market data with token IDs, outcomes, and current odds. Markets rotate every 5 minutes.
Recurring crypto market series (5m, 15m, 1h, 4h, daily, weekly, monthly patterns).

Returns all positions (open and closed) for a wallet with accurate realized P&L from onchain settlement data. Includes positions that no longer appear in the standard v1 positions endpoint.

Responses are cached for 5 minutes per wallet. First request takes 200ms-3s depending on position count. Cached responses return in under 50ms.

example.error: API key required. Get one at polynode.dev

get.description:
Returns closed positions for a wallet with full market metadata (title, outcome, slug) and realized P&L. Supports pagination and sorting.

Complements the onchain positions endpoint. The onchain endpoint returns all positions with accurate P&L but no market metadata. This endpoint returns closed positions with metadata.

example.error: API key required. Get one at polynode.dev

get.description: Query every position on Polymarket. Filter by wallet, market, status, or minimum size.

parameters.name: pagination_key
parameters.description: Cursor from a previous response to fetch the next page

400.description: Invalid filter or market not found

403.description: Invalid API key or free tier

get.description: Query every trade ever executed on Polymarket. Filter by wallet, market, time range, or minimum size. Full history with cursor pagination.

parameters.name: wallet
parameters.description: Filter by wallet address (matches both maker and taker sides)

parameters.name: start_time
parameters.description: Unix timestamp — only return trades after this time

parameters.name: end_time
parameters.description: Unix timestamp — only return trades before this time

parameters.name: order
parameters.description: Sort direction. asc requires at least one filter.

parameters.name: pagination_key
parameters.description: Cursor from a previous response to fetch the next page

400.description: Invalid filter combination or market not found

403.description: Invalid API key or free tier

get.description: Complete onchain trade fill history for any wallet.

parameters.name: cursor
parameters.description: Cursor pagination. Pass empty string `?cursor=` for the first page, then echo back `pagination.cursor` from each response. Format: `<lastTs>:<lastId>`. Each page loads at the same speed regardless of depth — recommended over offset for paging beyond ~25K results.

get.description: All onchain redemptions for a wallet.
Splits, merges, and neg-risk conversions for a wallet.
Complete onchain trade history for a market token.

parameters.name: cursor
parameters.description: Cursor pagination. Pass empty string `?cursor=` for the first page, then echo back `pagination.cursor` from each response. Format: `<lastTs>:<lastId>`. Each page loads at the same speed regardless of depth — recommended over offset for paging beyond ~25K results.

get.description: Lifetime onchain volume statistics for a market token.
Onchain open interest for a specific market.
Total platform-wide open interest from onchain data.
All 170 available sports and esports leagues. The sport field is the code you use in all other sports endpoints.

Games for a league with scores, teams, market data, token IDs, and upstream fallback metadata. PolyNode resolves the league code to a Polymarket sports series ID, fetches by series_id, then applies status filtering, sorting, limit, and offset locally. Responses include source, fallback, and stale fields so clients can tell when alternate Gamma sources or last-known-good cache were used.

parameters.name: code
parameters.description: League code (e.g. fifwc, fif, nba, lol, cs2)

200.description: Game list. Top-level fields include league, status, series_id, source, fallback, stale, count, and games.

get.description: Full game data: score, teams, markets, and AI-generated preview.
Canonical game-centric state: game metadata, score fields, markets enriched with current CLOB prices, orderbook subscribe payload, and optional CLOB price history.

parameters.name: include_history
parameters.description: Include batch CLOB price history in the response. Defaults to false.

parameters.name: price_limit_tokens
parameters.description: Maximum game tokens to price. Defaults to 200, capped at 200.

parameters.name: history_limit_tokens
parameters.description: Maximum game tokens to include in history. Defaults to 20, capped at 20.

parameters.name: interval
parameters.description: Polymarket CLOB history interval, e.g. 1d, 1w, max. Defaults to max when history is requested without an explicit time window.

parameters.name: fidelity
parameters.description: History fidelity in minutes, passed through to CLOB.

parameters.name: start_ts
parameters.description: History start timestamp, unix seconds or YYYY-MM-DD.

parameters.name: end_ts
parameters.description: History end timestamp, unix seconds or YYYY-MM-DD.

get.description: Agent-friendly sports context. Generates matchup, injury, lineup, news, social, or market-specific queries from a Polymarket game, then runs optional external sources such as X Search and Online Search. Additive endpoint; no context data is persisted.

parameters.name: sources
parameters.description: Comma-separated context sources. Supported: x, online. Aliases: web, search, ddg, ddg_instant. Defaults to x.

parameters.name: max_queries
parameters.description: Number of generated queries to run. Defaults to 3, capped at 5.

parameters.name: max_per_query
parameters.description: Per-source result count per generated query. Defaults to 5, capped at 10.

parameters.name: include_state
parameters.description: Include the canonical /state payload alongside context. Defaults to false.

parameters.name: price_limit_tokens
parameters.description: Maximum tokens to price when include_state=true. Defaults to 20, capped at 200.

get.description: Teams for a league with logos, records, and colors.
Search for games, teams, and events by name. PolyNode first uses Polymarket public search, then falls back to Gamma tag/event search when that upstream is unavailable.

Real-time snapshot across all sports: volumes, market counts, upcoming leagues. Uses Polymarket sports summary when healthy and falls back to per-league series/event data when that upstream summary is partial or empty.
All 99 sports and esports market types.
All recurring series: sports seasons, crypto markets, weather.
Single series with volume and linked events.
Tournament brackets with phases, teams, and seeds.
Single tournament bracket with phases, teams, and seeds.
Server-built OHLCV candles from real onchain trades. Anchor-based pagination with buy/sell volume split, VWAP, and trade counts.

parameters.name: condition_id
parameters.description: Alternative to token_id. Errors if multi-outcome.

parameters.name: market_slug
parameters.description: Alternative to token_id. Errors if multi-outcome.

parameters.name: gap_fill
parameters.description: Fill empty buckets with carry-forward candles

200.description: OHLCV candles built from trade window

get.description: Time-ordered equity curve for a Polymarket wallet, with optional dollar-normalized copy-trade analysis. Default returns realized P&L only. Pass include_unrealized=1 to mark open positions to current market price.

parameters.name: period
parameters.description: Time window. Positions whose first activity falls before the start of the window are excluded.

parameters.name: normalize
parameters.description: Set to 1 to include the $1-normalized equity curve alongside the raw curve.

parameters.name: from
parameters.description: Start date. YYYY-MM-DD (treated as UTC midnight) or unix seconds.

parameters.name: to
parameters.description: End date. Same format as from.

parameters.name: max_markets
parameters.description: Keep only the most recent N markets the wallet has touched.

parameters.name: include_unrealized
parameters.description: Set to 1 to mark open positions to current market price and include unrealized P&L. Off by default. Slower and non-deterministic.

429.description: Rate limit exceeded (1 request per 10 seconds per API key)

get.description: Returns the entire trade history for a market token in a single response. No client-side pagination. Up to 250,000 trades per call. **Growth plan or above.**

403.description: Tier requirement not met (Growth plan or above)

get.description: Returns the entire trade history for a wallet in a single response. No client-side pagination. Up to 250,000 trades per call. **Growth plan or above.**

403.description: Tier requirement not met (Growth plan or above)

get.description: Get wallet profit and loss. Default/all-time mode returns current all-time P&L. Time-windowed mode returns realized P&L for the selected range.

parameters.name: include_unrealized
parameters.description: Include current unrealized P&L alongside time-windowed realized P&L

400.description: Invalid wallet address or query parameter

get.description: Get wallet P&L buckets. Default/all-time mode returns a single all-time bucket. Explicit time filters return realized P&L buckets.

parameters.name: after
parameters.description: Unix timestamp lower bound. Values below 1 are clamped to 1.

400.description: Invalid wallet address or query parameter

get.description: Get fee-bearing fills where the wallet is the order owner.

400.description: Invalid wallet address or query parameter

get.description: Get PolyUSD deposits and withdrawals for one wallet.

400.description: Invalid wallet address or query parameter

get.description: Get Polymarket-reported maker rebates for one maker address and date.

parameters.name: date
parameters.description: UTC date in YYYY-MM-DD format. Defaults to current UTC date.

get.description: List public Polymarket reward-market configurations.
Get public Polymarket reward-market configuration for a condition ID.
Every listed perps instrument with full contract config (leverage, risk tiers, precision, funding interval), plus `first_seen`. Filter with `?category=` (crypto, index, commodity, equity).

parameters.name: category
parameters.description: Filter to one category: crypto, index, commodity, equity.

parameters.name: min_funding
parameters.description: Only instruments with funding rate >= this

get.description: Live index/mark/last/mid price, open interest, funding rate and next funding for every instrument.
Live prices, open interest and funding for one instrument. `index_price` is the real underlying asset price.

parameters.name: instrument
parameters.description: Instrument id (e.g. `6`), symbol (`BTC-USD`), or bare asset (`btc`).

get.description: Top-of-book best bid/offer for every instrument.
Top-of-book best bid/offer for one instrument.

parameters.name: instrument
parameters.description: Instrument id (e.g. `6`), symbol (`BTC-USD`), or bare asset (`btc`).

get.description: Full order book (price/quantity levels, best-first). Use `?depth=` to limit levels per side.

parameters.name: instrument
parameters.description: Instrument id (e.g. `6`), symbol (`BTC-USD`), or bare asset (`btc`).

get.description: Recent executions (price, quantity, side, time). Add `after`/`before` for archived history deeper than the exchange serves.

parameters.name: instrument
parameters.description: Instrument id (e.g. `6`), symbol (`BTC-USD`), or bare asset (`btc`).

parameters.name: after
parameters.description: Only rows after this time (Unix seconds or ms).

parameters.name: before
parameters.description: Only rows before this time (Unix seconds or ms).

get.description: Rolling 24h volume, open price and hourly candles for every instrument.
Rolling 24h volume, open price and hourly candles for one instrument.

parameters.name: instrument
parameters.description: Instrument id (e.g. `6`), symbol (`BTC-USD`), or bare asset (`btc`).

get.description: Candlestick data. `interval` = 1m,5m,15m,30m,1h,4h,6h,12h,1d,1w. `start` is optional (defaults to a sane window).

parameters.name: instrument
parameters.description: Instrument id (e.g. `6`), symbol (`BTC-USD`), or bare asset (`btc`).

get.description: Hourly funding-rate history, newest first. Window with `start_timestamp`/`end_timestamp` (Unix ms).

parameters.name: instrument
parameters.description: Instrument id (e.g. `6`), symbol (`BTC-USD`), or bare asset (`btc`).

parameters.name: start_timestamp
parameters.description: Window start, Unix ms (legacy alias of `after`).

parameters.name: end_timestamp
parameters.description: Window end, Unix ms (legacy alias of `before`).

parameters.name: after
parameters.description: Only rows after this time (Unix seconds or ms). Alias of start_timestamp.

parameters.name: before
parameters.description: Only rows before this time (Unix seconds or ms). Alias of end_timestamp.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Max rows to return (default 500, up to 5000).

get.description: Open-interest time series (with mark price and funding at each sample) — history the exchange does not offer.

parameters.name: instrument
parameters.description: Instrument id (e.g. `6`), symbol (`BTC-USD`), or bare asset (`btc`).

parameters.name: after
parameters.description: Only rows after this time (Unix seconds or ms).

parameters.name: before
parameters.description: Only rows before this time (Unix seconds or ms).

get.description: Bucketed notional volume and trade counts. `bucket` = 1m,5m,15m,1h,4h,1d.

parameters.name: instrument
parameters.description: Instrument id (e.g. `6`), symbol (`BTC-USD`), or bare asset (`btc`).

parameters.name: after
parameters.description: Only rows after this time (Unix seconds or ms).

parameters.name: before
parameters.description: Only rows before this time (Unix seconds or ms).

get.description: Index price and constituents for an underlying asset.
Tiered maker/taker fee rates by 30-day volume, per instrument category.
The exchange's own per-account trading limits by 14-day volume (informational).
EIP-712 domain and custody contract details for the perps exchange.
Collateral token config (pUSD address, decimals, withdrawal fee).
One call: resolve any Polymarket address, report the wallet type + signer, perps registration, and (if registered) the live enriched portfolio.

parameters.name: address
parameters.description: Polymarket proxy wallet **or** signer EOA (`0x...`). Resolution is automatic.

get.description: Live perps positions and equity for a wallet, enriched per position with symbol, side, mark price and notional.

parameters.name: address
parameters.description: Polymarket proxy wallet **or** signer EOA (`0x...`). Resolution is automatic.

get.description: Whether a wallet has activated a perps account. Cheapest way to filter a wallet list before requesting portfolios.

parameters.name: address
parameters.description: Polymarket proxy wallet **or** signer EOA (`0x...`). Resolution is automatic.

get.description: Live cross-instrument screen: per-instrument funding rate, open interest, and the **basis** (mark minus index, in bps). Sort by `funding`, `oi`, or `basis`, and filter by `min_funding`. Computed on demand — Polymarket has no cross-instrument screen.

parameters.name: min_funding
parameters.description: Only instruments with funding rate >= this

get.description: Top perps accounts, ranked. `metric=equity` ranks by account equity; `metric=size` by total open notional; `metric=pnl` by total unrealized PnL. Optional `instrument` filter. **Polymarket has no perps leaderboard** — perps trades carry no account attribution, so this only exists because we snapshot every account's portfolio over time.

A wallet's perps positions over time — how each position changed, opened, or closed, with equity and PnL trajectory. Polymarket only returns a wallet's *current* portfolio; this is the accumulated history. Filter by `instrument` and time window (`after`/`before`). A read also captures a fresh snapshot when the latest is stale, so the current state is always included.

parameters.name: address
parameters.description: Polymarket proxy wallet or signer EOA (`0x...`). Resolved automatically.

parameters.name: after
parameters.description: Only rows after this time (Unix s or ms)

get.description: Aggregate positioning for one instrument across all tracked accounts, over time: total long size, total short size, and the net. Answers 'is the crowd long or short, and how is that shifting' — impossible from Polymarket's per-account API.

parameters.name: instrument
parameters.description: Instrument id (`6`), symbol (`BTC-USD`), or bare asset (`btc`).

get.description: Current large open positions across all tracked accounts, notional-sorted — a live whale-position feed. Filter by `min_notional` and `instrument`.
Check perps registration for many wallets in one call (max 50). Each address is resolved and reported inline; a failure on one address does not fail the batch.

parameters.name: addresses
parameters.description: Comma-separated Polymarket addresses (proxy wallet or signer). Resolution is automatic.

get.description: Fetch the enriched live portfolio for many wallets in one call (max 20). Each address is resolved and reported inline; a failure on one address does not fail the batch.

parameters.name: addresses
parameters.description: Comma-separated Polymarket addresses (proxy wallet or signer). Resolution is automatic.

get.description: Biggest depositors ranked by total pUSD deposited, keyed by the real beneficiary account (not the router).

parameters.name: min_usd
parameters.description: Only rows with total/size >= this many pUSD.

get.description: Biggest withdrawers ranked by total pUSD withdrawn.

parameters.name: min_usd
parameters.description: Only rows with total/size >= this many pUSD.

get.description: Recent deposits, filterable by size and time. Each row carries the depositor (often a router) and the beneficiary (real account).

parameters.name: min_usd
parameters.description: Only rows with total/size >= this many pUSD.

parameters.name: after
parameters.description: Only rows after this time (Unix s or ms).

parameters.name: before
parameters.description: Only rows before this time (Unix s or ms).

get.description: Recent withdrawals, filterable by size and time.

parameters.name: min_usd
parameters.description: Only rows with total/size >= this many pUSD.

parameters.name: after
parameters.description: Only rows after this time (Unix s or ms).

parameters.name: before
parameters.description: Only rows before this time (Unix s or ms).

get.description: One wallet's collateral flow: total deposited, withdrawn, net, and recent events. Resolved to the signer.

parameters.name: address
parameters.description: Polymarket address (any form) or signer; resolved automatically.

get.description: Protocol collateral: current net (deposited - withdrawn) plus a daily net-flow series.
Transparency metric: for each instrument, our tracked long/short open interest (from the latest position snapshots) vs the exchange's live reported OI.
The perp's premium/discount to spot over time: mark - index (absolute and in bps), from the ticker snapshots.

parameters.name: instrument
parameters.description: Instrument id (6), symbol (BTC-USD), or bare asset (btc).

parameters.name: after
parameters.description: Only rows after this time (Unix s or ms).

parameters.name: before
parameters.description: Only rows before this time (Unix s or ms).

get.description: Per time bucket: taker buy vs sell notional, net quantity, and the running cumulative volume delta (CVD). side = taker direction.

parameters.name: instrument
parameters.description: Instrument id (6), symbol (BTC-USD), or bare asset (btc).

parameters.name: after
parameters.description: Only rows after this time (Unix s or ms).

parameters.name: before
parameters.description: Only rows before this time (Unix s or ms).

get.description: The funding-rate series plus a running sum - what a 1-unit long has paid (positive) or earned (negative) over the window.

parameters.name: instrument
parameters.description: Instrument id (6), symbol (BTC-USD), or bare asset (btc).

parameters.name: after
parameters.description: Only rows after this time (Unix s or ms).

parameters.name: before
parameters.description: Only rows before this time (Unix s or ms).

get.description: Rank wallets by real TRADING P&L over a window: equity change minus net deposits. Possible only because we hold both equity snapshots and on-chain collateral flows.
Real-time whale-activity feed: opened / closed / increased / reduced / flipped, built by diffing position snapshots. Filter by type, instrument, min_notional, address, liquidation, after.

parameters.name: after
parameters.description: Only rows after this time (Unix s or ms).

get.description: Likely liquidations - position closes wiped at a large loss. Same shape as events.

parameters.name: after
parameters.description: Only rows after this time (Unix s or ms).

get.description: Lifetime or time-windowed totals per credit type for one wallet, in one call. Polymarket's own API only exposes these as a raw activity feed you would have to page and sum yourself.

parameters.name: types
parameters.description: Comma-separated set of credit types (One of `reward`, `yield`, `maker_rebate`, `taker_rebate`, `referral_reward`), or `all` for every type.

get.description: Individual credit events for one wallet with filters Polymarket does not offer: amount bounds, amount sorting, token filter.

parameters.name: types
parameters.description: Comma-separated set of credit types (One of `reward`, `yield`, `maker_rebate`, `taker_rebate`, `referral_reward`), or `all` for every type.

get.description: Time-bucketed earnings series per credit type for one wallet.

parameters.name: types
parameters.description: Comma-separated set of credit types (One of `reward`, `yield`, `maker_rebate`, `taker_rebate`, `referral_reward`), or `all` for every type.

parameters.name: fill
parameters.description: `zero` to emit empty buckets, `skip` (default) to omit them.

get.description: Top earners for any credit type over any window, across every wallet. Not possible with Polymarket's per-wallet activity feed.

parameters.name: type
parameters.description: One of `reward`, `yield`, `maker_rebate`, `taker_rebate`, `referral_reward`, or `all` to rank by combined credits.

parameters.name: types
parameters.description: Comma-separated set of credit types (One of `reward`, `yield`, `maker_rebate`, `taker_rebate`, `referral_reward`), or `all` for every type.

get.description: Program-wide aggregates per credit type: totals, unique recipients, batch transaction counts, average credit size, plus a bucketed series.

parameters.name: types
parameters.description: Comma-separated set of credit types (One of `reward`, `yield`, `maker_rebate`, `taker_rebate`, `referral_reward`), or `all` for every type.

get.description: Most recent credit events across ALL wallets — watch large rebates or rewards land in near real time. Cursor-paginated.

parameters.name: types
parameters.description: Comma-separated set of credit types (One of `reward`, `yield`, `maker_rebate`, `taker_rebate`, `referral_reward`), or `all` for every type.

parameters.name: cursor
parameters.description: Opaque cursor from `next_cursor` of the previous page.

get.description: The on-chain payout addresses behind each credit type, with lifetime totals — full transparency into where the money comes from.
Decode one payout transaction into typed credit rows: every recipient, every amount.

404.description: Transaction not found in the credits index

get.description: How many wallets earned their first credit per bucket — program growth over time.

parameters.name: types
parameters.description: Comma-separated set of credit types (One of `reward`, `yield`, `maker_rebate`, `taker_rebate`, `referral_reward`), or `all` for every type.

post.description: Resolve up to 1,000 Polymarket trading wallets to usernames, controlling EOAs and wallet types in one call — roughly 1000x the throughput of per-wallet resolution.

get.description: Search 5M+ Polymarket usernames by substring, similarity-ranked with exact matches first. Polymarket has no public username search.

Resolve one address: by trading wallet (returns username, EOA, wallet type and the user's other wallets) or, if not a known trading wallet, by controlling EOA (returns every wallet that account controls).

BlockEvent.description: Summary of a new confirmed block with Polymarket-relevant stats.

timestamp.description: Candle bucket start timestamp (ms, floored to resolution).

DecodedTrade.description: Decoded trade information from a matchOrders transaction.

PriceLevel.description: A single price level in the order book.

size.description: Total size available at this price level (e.g. "1500.25")

OrderBookMetadata.description: PolyNode market metadata enrichment (not present in Polymarket's CLOB API).

OrderBookResponse.description: Full order book snapshot. Base fields match Polymarket's CLOB `/book` response exactly. The `metadata` field is a PolyNode addition.

hash.description: 40-character hex hash of the book state

bids.description: Bid price levels, sorted ascending by price

asks.description: Ask price levels, sorted descending by price

min_order_size.description: Minimum order size for this market (e.g. "5")

tick_size.description: Minimum price increment for this market (e.g. "0.01" or "0.001")

neg_risk.description: Whether this is a neg-risk market

MidpointResponse.description: Midpoint price. The `mid` field matches Polymarket's CLOB `/midpoint` response. Additional fields are PolyNode enrichment.

mid.description: Midpoint price as decimal string, calculated as (best_bid + best_ask) / 2

SpreadResponse.description: Bid-ask spread. The `spread` field matches Polymarket's CLOB `/spread` response. Additional fields are PolyNode enrichment.

spread.description: Bid-ask spread as decimal string, calculated as best_ask - best_bid

MultiOutcomeBookResponse.description: Order books for all outcomes in a market or event. Returned when querying by condition ID or slug.

slug.description: Event slug (present when queried by slug)

condition_id.description: Condition ID (present when queried by condition ID)

MultiOutcomeMidpointResponse.description: Midpoints for all outcomes. Returned when querying by condition ID or slug.

condition_id.description: Present when queried by condition ID

MultiOutcomeSpreadResponse.description: Spreads for all outcomes. Returned when querying by condition ID or slug.

condition_id.description: Present when queried by condition ID

EventStatus.description: Status of an event — pending (mempool) or confirmed (in a block).

Exchange.description: Which exchange contract emitted the event.

MarketState.description: Live state for a single market (identified by token ID).

last_price.description: Last traded price (0-1 for binary, varies for multi-outcome).

last_status.description: Last known event status for this market.

PositionChangeEvent.description: Token transfer from the Conditional Tokens (ERC-1155) contract.

condition_id.description: Condition ID for this market (CTF contract identifier).

event_title.description: Parent event title if this market is part of a group.

market_image.description: Market image URL from Gamma metadata.

neg_risk.description: Whether this market uses the negRisk contract type.

SettlementEvent.description: A decoded settlement event from matchOrders calldata.

condition_id.description: Condition ID for this market (CTF contract identifier).

event_title.description: Parent event title if this market is part of a group.

market_image.description: Market image URL from Gamma metadata.

neg_risk.description: Whether this market uses the negRisk contract type.

StatusUpdateEvent.description: Notification that a previously-pending settlement is now confirmed.

event_title.description: Parent event title if this market is part of a group.

latency_ms.description: Time from pending detection to block confirmation (ms).

market_image.description: Market image URL from Gamma metadata.

neg_risk.description: Whether this market uses the negRisk contract type.

TradeEvent.description: A confirmed trade from OrderFilled event log on CTF Exchange.

condition_id.description: Condition ID for this market (CTF contract identifier).

event_title.description: Parent event title if this market is part of a group.

market_image.description: Market image URL from Gamma metadata.

neg_risk.description: Whether this market uses the negRisk contract type.

WalletPosition.description: A single position with P&L data.

asset.description: Token ID of the outcome token.

initialValue.description: Total cost basis (USDC spent to acquire position).

currentValue.description: Current market value of the position.

percentPnl.description: Total P&L as a percentage of initial value.

redeemable.description: Whether the position can be redeemed (market resolved in this outcome's favor).

redeemed.description: Whether the position has been redeemed onchain (tokens burned for USDC). Only present when `redeemable` is true. Determined by checking the CTF contract balance — zero balance means fully redeemed.

unredeemed_balance.description: Number of tokens still held onchain (not yet redeemed). Only present when `redeemable` is true. Matches `size` if nothing has been redeemed.

unredeemed_usd.description: USD value of unredeemed tokens. On resolved winning positions, each token is worth $1. Only present when `redeemable` is true.

negativeRisk.description: Whether this is a negative-risk market.

MarketPositionsResponse.description: Holder positions for a market, grouped by outcome token.

outcomes.description: Array of outcome tokens, each containing a list of holder positions.

MarketHolderPosition.description: A single holder's position in a market outcome.

firstTradeAt.description: Unix timestamp of the holder's first trade on this market. Only present when `includeTrades=true`.

lastTradeAt.description: Unix timestamp of the holder's most recent trade on this market. Only present when `includeTrades=true`.

WalletActivity.description: Activity summary for a tracked wallet.

trade_count.description: Number of trades in tracking window.
